subject: GRB000214 refined BeppoSAX-WFC position
body:
GRB000214 refined BeppoSAX-WFC position
 
Refined  coordinates from WFC are:

R.A.(2000)= 283.576
DEC(2000)= -66.439

i.e. 1' off from the preliminary position
The error radius is 6.5'

A follow-up pointing with the Narrow Field Instruments of BeppoSAX is
being planned

Luigi Piro
BeppoSAX Mission Scientist
